title: European stocks nudge higher amid U.S.-Iran ceasefire uncertainty
summary_full: Shares in Europe opened slightly higher on Friday as the fragile ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran continues to test investors' nerves.
summary_public: Shares in Europe opened slightly higher on Friday as the fragile ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran continues to test investors' nerves.
